products.title: VersoID
products.description: A Flutter-based digital identity management app that lets users create and share multiple professional personas with QR codes. Switch between work, creator, and social identities with a single tap. Available on iOS; Android coming soon.

products.title: Prompt Optimizer
products.description: A Chrome extension that upgrades prompts into clearer, more detailed, and more effective versions for AI models like ChatGPT and Google Gemini. The May 2026 release adds snippets and Ollama support.

products.title: Job Atlas
products.description: Notion-inspired Chrome extension designed to revolutionize how you search for roles. Instantly save and organize job postings from any career site into a private, searchable pipeline. Capture, track, and manage your entire job search journey locally.

products.title: gac – AI Git Copilot
products.description: NPM-distributed CLI that generates semantic commit messages and changelogs via LLM — version control consistency without the manual overhead.

products.title: DIRA – Design Research Assistant
products.description: Extracts design system tokens, typography scales, and color palettes from any live site — competitive research without leaving the DOM.

products.title: SEO & Accessibility Helper
products.description: Real-time WCAG compliance checks, on-page SEO analysis, and Core Web Vitals tracking — all from a Chrome side panel while you browse.

products.title: NoteApply AI
products.description: Privacy-first research side panel using local Ollama and Gemini for voice dictation and automated knowledge extraction from technical docs.

products.title: Tab Atlas
products.description: Maps Chrome tab sessions into persistent, human-readable workspaces — context-switching solved for developers juggling multiple projects.
